category_sources: Official repository https://github.com/lifelines/lifelines says LifeLines is a genealogy software system.
source_facts.description says LifeLines is text-based genealogy software.
display_name_sources: Official repository README at https://github.com/lifelines/lifelines uses the display name LifeLines.
docs_sources: Official repository README at https://github.com/lifelines/lifelines links to https://lifelines.github.io/lifelines/.
source_facts.homepage is the official LifeLines GitHub Pages site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/lifelines/lifelines; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official repository https://github.com/lifelines/lifelines describes the LifeLines genealogy software system.
